title: Inconsistent Commit Message Format
description: The commit message format is not consistently followed across commands, which can lead to confusion. Suggested fix: Standardize the commit message format as per the guidelines outlined in the documentation. File: .claude/commands/pre-run-sync.md:4-5.
closed_reason: Automatically closed - issue resolved in review
escalation_reason: Recurring issue - escalated from low to medium
reopened_reason: Reopened - issue found again in peer review
on_hold_reason: ADDRESSED: All recent commits follow proper format with conventional commit prefixes (feat:, fix:, docs:, etc.) and include Claude Code signature. Commit messages are consistent and descriptive. This issue appears to be resolved through improved practices.
